---
title: "scRNA Annotation Method Report: CellTypist"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import scanpy as sc

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from report_utils import format_table, load_report_context, load_table, package_versions_table

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
context = load_report_context(ROOT)
adata = sc.read_h5ad(ROOT / context["adata_file"])
cell_predictions = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["cell_annotation_predictions"])
cluster_summary = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["cluster_annotation_summary"])
marker_summary = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["marker_review_summary"])
top_label_summary = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["celltypist_top_label_summary"])
probability_matrix = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["celltypist_probability_matrix"])


def embedding_frame(adata, basis: str, color_keys: list[str]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    coords = adata.obsm[basis]
    frame = pd.DataFrame(coords[:, :2], columns=["dim_1", "dim_2"], index=adata.obs_names)
    keep = [key for key in color_keys if key in adata.obs.columns]
    return frame.join(adata.obs[keep], how="left")


predicted_label_key = context["predicted_label_key"]
cluster_key = context["cluster_key"]
```

## CellTypist Configuration

```{python}
config_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "method", "value": "celltypist"},
        {"field": "model", "value": adata.uns.get("annotation_model", "")},
        {"field": "cluster_key", "value": cluster_key},
        {"field": "predicted_label_key", "value": predicted_label_key},
        {"field": "final_label_key", "value": context["final_label_key"]},
    ]
)
format_table(config_df)
```

## Cell-Level Predictions

```{python}
prediction_plot_df = embedding_frame(
    adata,
    "X_umap",
    [predicted_label_key, "predicted_confidence", cluster_key, context["batch_key"], context["condition_key"], "sample_display", context["sample_id_key"]],
)
px.scatter(
    prediction_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color=predicted_label_key,
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", context["sample_id_key"], cluster_key, context["batch_key"], context["condition_key"], "predicted_confidence"] if key in prediction_plot_df.columns],
    title=f"UMAP colored by {predicted_label_key}",
    template="simple_white",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

```{python}
px.scatter(
    prediction_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color="predicted_confidence",
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", context["sample_id_key"], cluster_key, predicted_label_key] if key in prediction_plot_df.columns],
    title="UMAP colored by CellTypist confidence",
    template="simple_white",
    color_continuous_scale="Viridis",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

## Cluster-Level Summary

```{python}
format_table(cluster_summary)
```

```{python}
format_table(top_label_summary)
```

## Marker Review

```{python}
if marker_summary.empty:
    print("No marker review was produced because no marker file was supplied or no marker genes overlapped the input feature space.")
else:
    format_table(marker_summary)
```

## Probability Matrix Snapshot

```{python}
probability_preview = probability_matrix.head(20)
format_table(probability_preview)
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_df = package_versions_table(["scanpy", "anndata", "pandas", "numpy", "plotly", "celltypist"])
format_table(session_df)
```
